failure_mode: No response (connection hangs / times out) on all endpoints
root_cause: EBI retired the standalone OxO (Ontology Xref Service). Every OxO endpoint (/api/search, /api/datasources, the web index) is unreachable and hangs until timeout, while other services on the same host (notably OLS4 at https://www.ebi.ac.uk/ols4) respond normally — ruling out a network issue. OxO's cross-reference/mapping functionality has been folded into the Ontology Lookup Service (OLS).
workaround: Use OLS (ols_* tools / https://www.ebi.ac.uk/ols4) for ontology term lookup and cross-references. OLS term records carry database cross-references (oboXref / obo_xref), which cover the most common OxO use case (find equivalent identifiers for an ontology term across MONDO/EFO/DOID/HP/OMIM/UMLS/MeSH/etc.). For disease-ID translation specifically, OpenTargets_map_any_disease_id_to_all_other_ids also resolves across ontology namespaces.
investigation_notes: GET/OPTIONS/POST to https://www.ebi.ac.uk/spot/oxo/api/search all hang -> connection returns no HTTP response (curl shows code 000 after the full timeout)
Same EBI host: https://www.ebi.ac.uk/ols4/api/ontologies returns HTTP 200 in <1s, and ebi.ac.uk/interpro + ebi.ac.uk/chebi respond normally — so this is OxO-specific, not a network outage
OxO has a long-standing EBI deprecation notice; mapping data is served through OLS now
If EBI restores or relocates OxO, move this back out of broken_apis and update the endpoint
